---
title: "Brevet 300 Vuelta del Cobre"
date: "2026-01-31"
categories: 
  - ciclismo
---

:::: {.tabla_ciclismo}
| Variable                | Valor     |
|------------------------:|-----------|
|**Distancia total:**     | 294.80 km |
|**Ascenso acumulado**    | 2,313 m   |
|**Velocidad promedio:**  | 22.3 km/h |
|**Tiempo en movimiento** | 13:13:17  |
|**Tiempo total**         | 16:23:04  |
::::

<div class="strava-embed-placeholder" data-embed-type="activity" data-embed-id="17244569611" data-style="standard"></div><script src="https://strava-embeds.com/embed.js"></script>
